# Fly.io dry-run preview
# Captured from: r1 deploy --provider fly --app my-app --dry-run
#
# This golden fixture pins the shape of the dry-run output so future
# refactors to deploy_cmd.go / fly_adapter.go don't silently change
# what operators see when they preview a deploy.
app = "my-app"
primary_region = "iad"
